title: Xtra Smoky Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A bitter, bouncy, and adventurous Brazilian dish featuring smoky paprika, this recipe is perfect for those looking for a low-glycemic-friendly meal option, the chicken is poached before being grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together smoky paprika, coconut oil, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the smoky paprika mixture.
Poach the chicken in boiling water for 5 minutes, then remove and set aside.
Thread the poached chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with coconut oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken skewers for 10 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked through.
Brush the chicken with lemon juice during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
